title: blechnum milnei
intro: Blechnum milnei, also known as Milne's chain fern or chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Blechnum milnei include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves can be dried or processed into capsules for medicinal use.
